trivia_bullets.text: Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK) released September 27, 2024. The set is a top-down horror design centered on a single haunted mansion — the plane of Duskmourn itself — ruled by the moth demon Valgavoth. First premier MTG set built around modern interior horror rather than an open-world plane.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: Duskmourn Vision Design Handoff Part 1

trivia_bullets.text: "Hush, little ants. I can rid you of your troubles with a breath. All I ask in return is a drop of blood... and a promise." — unnamed demon speaker; predatory bargainer framing.

Uses a reflexive trigger structure: discarding is self-initiated, a second ability triggers when you do, and you choose targets then — not in advance. Scales with hand size; emptying hand clears up to six creatures simultaneously.
Artist Mathias Kollros has contributed 161+ cards to MTG since his 2012 debut in Return to Ravnica across 17+ sets, including multiple pieces in DSK (Waltz of Rage, Decree of Pain).
EDHREC rank 19,138 as of 2026-05-19 — among the less-adopted DSK uncommons in commander formats; treated as a budget role-filler at 6 mana.
